summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Paradigm genetic computing platform. All 16 backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend UI fully functional with successful prompt generation, gallery display, gene editing, and export functionality. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with PARADIGM heading and navigation
Architecture section displays 7 layers correctly
Inventions section shows 5 invention cards
All Enter Studio buttons navigate to /studio successfully
Studio loads with proper 3-column layout (Gallery/Lineage | Viewport/Prompt | Genes/Evolve/Breed/Export)
POST /api/ returns correct platform info (layers=7, domains=26, gene_types=17)
GET /api/domains returns 26 domains
GET /api/gene-types returns 17 gene types
POST /api/seeds creates seeds successfully
GET /api/seeds lists seeds from gallery
POST /api/seeds/generate creates seeds from prompts using LLM
POST /api/seeds/{id}/mutate creates mutated children
POST /api/seeds/breed breeds two seeds into child
POST /api/seeds/{id}/evolve runs MAP-Elites evolution
POST /api/seeds/{id}/grow generates artifact descriptors
PUT /api/seeds/{id}/genes updates gene values and rehashes
POST /api/keys/generate creates ECDSA P-256 keypairs
POST /api/seeds/{id}/sign signs seeds with private keys
POST /api/seeds/{id}/verify verifies seed signatures
Prompt bar accepts input and generates seeds successfully
Gallery displays seeds and allows selection
Gene editor shows gene sliders and controls
Evolve panel has algorithm/population/generation controls
Export panel generates keys and enables signing
All tabs in studio are functional and responsive
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and integrations working)
